overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a forest trail on a bright summer day. The character travels from an open meadow with a distant castle visible through increasingly dense woodland.

scene_state.functional_zone: open meadow trail with distant castle view

events.description: character turns left, causing the distant castle to exit the frame

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path toward the distant castle on the hill

entered.detail: medieval stone castle perched on a hilltop visible in the distance
winding dirt trail through the meadow
scattered green leafy trees lining the path
lush green grass with wildflowers on both sides of the trail
simple wooden posts marking the path boundary

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a sunlit dirt trail through an open meadow. A medieval castle sits atop a hill in the far distance to the left, surrounded by scattered trees, lush grass, and simple wooden fence posts.

events.description: castle exits view and snow-capped mountain peak becomes visible on the left
path begins to enter denser tree cover as forest closes in

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking along the path with mountains now visible in the left background

entered.detail: snow-capped mountain visible in the distance after the turn

segments.scene_description: After turning left, the castle disappears from view and snow-capped mountains become visible in the distance. The path continues through open grassland before beginning to enter denser tree cover.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with increasing tree canopy

events.description: increasing tree cover creates more shadow patches on the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the forest as trees close in on both sides of the path

entered.detail: large boulders and rocks along the path edge
thick bushes and vegetation lining the trail

segments.scene_description: The trail enters a denser forest section with thick tree cover on both sides. Large rocks and dense undergrowth appear along the path edges as the open meadow gives way to woodland, creating more shadows on the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep forest trail with heavy canopy cover

events.description: sunlight filters through dense canopy creating dappled light patterns on the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing through the deep forest with dense vegetation on all sides

entered.detail: thick shrubbery and flowering plants along the path edge
dappled sunlight filtering through the tree canopy onto the trail

segments.scene_description: The path winds through deep forest with thick undergrowth and a dense canopy overhead. Sunlight filters through the leaves creating patterns of light and shadow on the trail as Geralt continues through the enclosed woodland.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a sunlit open meadow gradually transforms into a dense, shadowed woodland. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt trail through lush grass, with a medieval castle visible atop a distant hill. As the path turns left and the castle vanishes from view, the horizon opens to reveal snow-capped mountains before the grassland begins to merge into thicker tree cover. The scene then shifts into a denser forest section where large rocks and heavy undergrowth line the path, causing the bright light to fade into deeper shadows. Finally, the trail winds deep into the enclosed woodland, where a thick overhead canopy filters the sunlight into shifting patterns across the forest floor.
